articles.title: Apple launches iPhone 17e at $599, boosts base storage - Honolulu Star-Advertiser
articles.description: Apple today launched iPhone 17e, its more affordable smartphone model that starts at a price of $599 with 256 gigabytes of storage, as it looks to defend its share in a fiercely competitive global handset market.

articles.title: KGO forecaster off the air after open-heart surgery - SFGATE
articles.description: Spencer Christian, weather forecaster for KGO-TV, has been off the air since February after an open-heart surgery.

articles.title: A new app alerts you if someone nearby is wearing smart glasses - TechCrunch
articles.description: A hobbyist developer's new app, which can detect nearby smart glasses, comes amid resistance to always-on recording and listening devices that invade people's privacy.
